name: postgres-local-docker
description:
Local Postgres 16 via docker compose. Adds docker-compose.yml with postgres service + healthcheck, and a `predev` npm-lifecycle script that starts the container and waits on pg_isready before `pnpm dev` runs. Mutually exclusive with postgres-neon — pick ONE postgres-* integration.

Pattern: production-tested.json `predev` + docker-compose.yml postgres service.
